name: ocr97_real_routing_validation
description: Real document artifacts for end-to-end auto-routing validation. Accuracy-scored and routing-smoke cases are reported separately.

cases.label: SROIE real photographed receipt 0000
cases.goal: Extract exact receipt fields: company, date, total, and address.

expected.address: NO 2 & 4, JALAN BAYU 4, BANDAR SERI ALAM, B1750 MASAI, JOHOR

cases.label: SROIE real photographed receipt 0001
cases.goal: Extract exact receipt fields: company, date, total, and address.

expected.address: NO 2 & 4, JALAN BAYU 4, BANDAR SERI ALAM, 81750 MASAI, JOHOR

cases.label: SROIE real receipt embedded as an image-only PDF
cases.goal: This is a scanned image-only PDF. Extract exact receipt fields: company, date, total, and address.

expected.address: NO 2 & 4, JALAN BAYU 4, BANDAR SERI ALAM, B1750 MASAI, JOHOR

cases.label: RVL-CDIP real scanned form
cases.goal: This is a photocopied form. Extract all readable text and preserve layout cues.

cases.label: RVL-CDIP real scanned invoice
cases.goal: This is a scanned invoice. Extract all readable text, tables, and exact numeric values.

cases.label: IAM real handwriting line 0000
cases.goal: This is handwritten English. Transcribe it exactly without paraphrasing.

cases.label: IAM real handwriting line 0001
cases.goal: This is handwritten English. Transcribe it exactly without paraphrasing.

cases.label: Real document containing a handwritten signature
cases.goal: This is a signed document. Extract all printed and handwritten text and note the presence of a signature.
